testcase.name: test_moveout_then_assign_existing_and_history

failure.message: AssertionError: [{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}] assert (True and 1 >= 2) + where True = isinstance([{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}], list) + and 1 = len([{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2.py:322: in test_moveout_then_assign_existing_and_history assert isinstance(history, list) and len(history) >= 2, history E AssertionError: [{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}] E assert (True and 1 >= 2) E + where True = isinstance([{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}], list) E + and 1 = len([{'id': 'c4724c8a-ca53-46f4-b30a-fbab120ded40', 'full_name': 'Phase2 Tenant', 'lease_start': '2026-03-01T00:00:00Z', 'lease_expiry': '2027-02-28T00:00:00Z', ...}])
